name: TRAPPED INSIDE THE ASS OF A FRIEND WHILE SHE EXPLORES A ABANDONED MANSION
description:
What lack of luck, now you are trapped inside the huge ass of your college friend Nozaki, because you both entered into a haunted mansion and you had the bad luck of being cursed by a futa to be ant sized. Sure you hope that she finds the away out of this place as fast as possible and doesn't get found by other futa monsters.

Side note: if you don't want to stay in her ass just ask to be put inside the front part of her panties.

Tags: Giantess, shrunken, fart, smell, piss, fart, fartfetish, futa, horror, possible vore, ryona;
